instruction: Write a FreeMarker template with macro `renderProductList` accepting a sequence of product maps (`name`, `price`, `inStock`). Render an unordered list; out-of-stock items show a strikethrough name and "(unavailable)" suffix. Escape names and format prices as currency.
code:
<#-- Model: products: sequence of maps { name, price, inStock } --> <#macro renderProductList products> <#if !products?has_content>

No products available.

<#else>
    <#list products as product>
  • <#if product.inStock!false> ${product.name?html} ${product.price?string.currency} <#else> ${product.name?html} (unavailable) ${product.price?string.currency}
